title: MP Board 5th, 8th Result 2026 LIVE: RSKMP Class 5, 8 results out at rskmp.in, 95.14% pass Class 5, 93.83% pass Class 8
description: MP Board 5th, 8th Result 2026 LIVE: RSKMP Class 5 and Class 8 results announced today, March 25. The results when declared is available on rskmp.in. Follow the blog for latest updates.
